SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

) AS `t`

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`, `t`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t`.`DiscountAmount`, `t`.`FinalPrice`, `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`OriginalPrice`, `t`.`ProductId`, `t`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`

    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`

SELECT `t`.`CartId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`UserId`, `t0`.`CartItemId`, `t0`.`AddedAt`, `t0`.`CartId`, `t0`.`ProductId`, `t0`.`Quantity`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`Description`, `t0`.`DescriptionEn`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`NameEn`, `t0`.`Price`, `t0`.`Stock`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Weight`, `t0`.`CategoryId0`, `t0`.`CreatedAt0`, `t0`.`Description0`, `t0`.`DescriptionEn0`, `t0`.`DisplayOrder`, `t0`.`Name0`, `t0`.`NameEn0`, `t0`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt0`, `t0`.`ImageId`, `t0`.`DisplayOrder0`, `t0`.`ImageURL`, `t0`.`IsPrimary`, `t0`.`ProductId1`
FROM (
    SELECT `c`.`CartId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`UserId`
    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DescriptionEn` AS `DescriptionEn0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`NameEn` AS `NameEn0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`
    FROM `cartitems` AS `c0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `c0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
    INNER JOIN `categories` AS `c1` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `c1`.`CategoryId`
    LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`, `t`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t`.`DiscountAmount`, `t`.`FinalPrice`, `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`OriginalPrice`, `t`.`ProductId`, `t`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
LEFT JOIN `shipping` AS `s` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `s`.`OrderId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`
    FROM `orderitems` AS `o0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
) AS `t` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t`.`OrderId`
WHERE `o`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `o`.`OrderId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`OrderNumber`, `t`.`ShippingCost`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`TotalAmount`, `t`.`UserId`, `t`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`PaymentId`, `t0`.`OrderItemId`, `t0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t0`.`DiscountAmount`, `t0`.`FinalPrice`, `t0`.`OrderId`, `t0`.`OriginalPrice`, `t0`.`ProductId`, `t0`.`Quantity`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`Description`, `t0`.`DescriptionEn`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`NameEn`, `t0`.`Price`, `t0`.`Stock`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Weight`, `t`.`City`, `t`.`CityRef`, `t`.`OrderId0`, `t`.`RecipientName`, `t`.`RecipientPhone`, `t`.`TrackingNumber`, `t`.`WarehouseNumber`, `t`.`WarehouseRef`, `t`.`Amount`, `t`.`CreatedAt0`, `t`.`IdempotencyKey`, `t`.`Method`, `t`.`OrderId1`, `t`.`Status0`, `t`.`StripePaymentIntentId`, `t`.`StripeSessionId`, `t`.`TransactionId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM (
    SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId` AS `OrderId0`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`, `p`.`PaymentId`, `p`.`Amount`, `p`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `p`.`IdempotencyKey`, `p`.`Method`, `p`.`OrderId` AS `OrderId1`, `p`.`Status` AS `Status0`, `p`.`StripePaymentIntentId`, `p`.`StripeSessionId`, `p`.`TransactionId`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `orders` AS `o`
    LEFT JOIN `shipping` AS `s` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `s`.`OrderId`
    LEFT JOIN `payments` AS `p` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `p`.`OrderId`
    WHERE `o`.`OrderId` = @__id_0
    LIMIT 1

FROM (
    SELECT `c`.`CartId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`UserId`
    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DescriptionEn` AS `DescriptionEn0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`NameEn` AS `NameEn0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`

    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `c0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
    INNER JOIN `categories` AS `c1` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `c1`.`CategoryId`
    LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`
ORDER BY `t`.`CartId`, `t0`.`CartItemId`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId0`

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`, `t`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t`.`DiscountAmount`, `t`.`FinalPrice`, `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`OriginalPrice`, `t`.`ProductId`, `t`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
LEFT JOIN `shipping` AS `s` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `s`.`OrderId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`
    FROM `orderitems` AS `o0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
) AS `t` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t`.`OrderId`
WHERE `o`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `o`.`OrderId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`

    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`

    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DescriptionEn` AS `DescriptionEn0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`NameEn` AS `NameEn0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`

    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`

) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`

    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`

) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`

    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0

) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DescriptionEn` AS `DescriptionEn0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`NameEn` AS `NameEn0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`, `t`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t`.`DiscountAmount`, `t`.`FinalPrice`, `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`OriginalPrice`, `t`.`ProductId`, `t`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`
FROM `orders` AS `o`

FROM (
    SELECT `c`.`CartId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`UserId`
    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DescriptionEn` AS `DescriptionEn0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`NameEn` AS `NameEn0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`
    FROM `cartitems` AS `c0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `c0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
    INNER JOIN `categories` AS `c1` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `c1`.`CategoryId`
    LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`, `t`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t`.`DiscountAmount`, `t`.`FinalPrice`, `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`OriginalPrice`, `t`.`ProductId`, `t`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
LEFT JOIN `shipping` AS `s` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `s`.`OrderId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`
    FROM `orderitems` AS `o0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
) AS `t` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t`.`OrderId`
WHERE `o`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `o`.`OrderId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`

) AS `t0` ON `t`.`OrderId` = `t0`.`OrderId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
